generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuation : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electronic speed control system using Vedder Electronic Speed Controller to adjust vehicle speed based on control signals from DigitalTwinEntity via ROS2 and Wi-Fi communication protocols."
]

instance SteeringServoActuation : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Servo mechanism for directional control of the autonomous vehicle, interfaced through PhysicalTwinEntity to receive steering commands from DigitalTwinEntity."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor mounted on upper-level chassis capturing 3D environmental point clouds for object detection and tracking."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i depth camera providing RGB-D frames for environmental perception and object tracking on the autonomous vehicle."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Implicit vehicle speed sensor providing real-time speed data for ego vehicle state monitoring and ACC system calculations."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Implicit steering angle sensor capturing real-time directional data for vehicle state monitoring and path projection."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance ObjectDetectionEventsDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm implementation for clustering LiDAR point clouds, executed in Python 3.8 within DigitalTwinEntity for object detection."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo JetsonOrinNanoGPU
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter implementation for object tracking using processed sensor data, executed in Python 3.8 within DigitalTwinEntity."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo JetsonOrinNanoGPU
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Performance Class I ACC model (ISO 15622) for lead vehicle detection and adaptive speed adjustment, implemented in MATLAB/Simulink and executed in DigitalTwinEntity."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo JetsonOrinNanoGPU
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D visualization model converting processed object tracks and driving paths for real-time display."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo JetsonOrinNanoGPU
]

instance ReportingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Report generation model creating human-readable time-series reports from object track data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo JetsonOrinNanoGPU
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw and processed 3D point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR, transmitted with 100ms timestamp accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringModel, KalmanFilterTrackingModel
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "RGB-D frames from Intel Deepsense D435i depth camera with clock-synchronized timestamps for environmental perception."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time ego vehicle state data including speed and steering angle with 100ms timestamp accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted, SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlModel, VisualizationModel
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object tracks generated from point cloud clustering and Kalman filtering, stored for visualization and reporting."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectDetectionEventsDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationModel, ReportingModel
]

instance SQLDatabaseStorage : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "External SQL database storing time-series object track data and vehicle state data for reporting and post-analysis."
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware enabling inter-node communication, hardware abstraction, and node lifecycle management for all Digital Twin components."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionService, DataPreProcessingService, ACCControlService, VisualizationService, ReportingService
]

instance JetsonOrinNanoGPU : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer with Jetpack 5.0 enabling GPU-accelerated processing of sensor data and model execution."
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringModel, KalmanFilterTrackingModel, ACCControlModel, VisualizationModel, ReportingModel
]

instance Python38Runtime : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 runtime environment executing point cloud processing algorithms and data collection scripts within DigitalTwinEntity."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionService, DataPreProcessingService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkRuntime : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment for complex systems modeling including ACC control logic and Kalman filtering implementations."
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControlModel
]

instance WiFiCommunication : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wi-Fi communication protocol enabling real-time data transmission between PhysicalTwinEntity and DigitalTwinEntity."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataCollectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data collection service aggregating sensor data streams (LiDAR, camera, vehicle state) with 100ms timestamp accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance DataPreProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Event-driven data pre-processing service filtering and normalizing raw sensor data for downstream processing."
    DTDFVocab:provides ProcessedSensorDataInsight
]

instance ACCControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control computation offloading service handling lead vehicle detection and speed adjustment logic."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCParameterAdjustmentAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization service rendering ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving paths in real-time."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance ReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated report generation service creating human-readable time-series reports of object tracks and vehicle state."
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateReportInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Geographically remote control service enabling enable/disable ACC, desired speed adjustment, and emergency braking."
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time insight providing operators with vehicle state (speed, steering angle), object tracks, and projected driving paths for situational awareness."
]

instance ProcessedSensorDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Processed sensor data insight containing filtered and normalized environmental perception data for downstream processing."
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization insight displaying processed object tracks and driving paths in real-time for operator monitoring."
]

instance VehicleStateReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable report insight containing time-series data of object tracks and vehicle state for post-analysis."
]

instance ACCParameterAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of ACC parameters (desired speed, time gap) based on lead vehicle detection."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking command execution triggered by critical object detection or operator input."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance RemoteControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote management command enabling/disable ACC system or adjusting parameters from geographically distant locations."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C1: Physical Twin Entity
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin hosting the 1/10-scale autonomous vehicle with lower-level chassis (Traxxas Slash 4x4) and upper-level autonomy components including sensors and actuators."
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera,
                 MotorActuation, SteeringServoActuation,
                 VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor
]

// C5: Digital Twin Entity
instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized Digital Twin Entity hosting all computation and control logic on Jetson Orin Nano with ROS2 middleware integration."
    base:contains ROS2Middleware, JetsonOrinNanoGPU,
                 Python38Runtime, MATLABSimulinkRuntime,
                 PointCloudClusteringModel, KalmanFilterTrackingModel,
                 ACCControlModel, VisualizationModel, ReportingModel,
                 DataCollectionService,
                 DataPreProcessingService, ACCControlService,
                 VisualizationService, ReportingService,
                 RemoteManagementService
]

// C8: User Interface Entity
instance UserInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Interface Entity providing monitoring and remote management capabilities through Control Panel and Visualization User Interface."
    base:contains ControlPanelUI, VisualizationUI
]

instance ControlPanelUI : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control Panel User Interface enabling remote management of ACC system including enable/disable commands and parameter adjustments."
    base:isContainedIn UserInterface
]

instance VisualizationUI : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D Visualization User Interface displaying real-time vehicle state, object tracks, and driving paths for situational awareness."
    base:isContainedIn UserInterface
]

// C8: Environment
instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Operational environment for the 1/10-scale autonomous vehicle including dynamic objects and static obstacles."
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserInterface
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the virtual world to the physical world include:
   - **Desired speed commands** computed by the **ACC Controlling FE** in the Digital Twin Entity, transmitted to the PT via **ROS2** and **Wi-Fi** for actuation by the **Vedder Electronic Speed Controller**.
   - **Emergency braking commands** sent from the **Control Panel User Interface FE** to the PT, triggering immediate deceleration via the **Actuation FE**.
   - **Remote management signals** (e.g., ACC enable/disable) processed by the **Control Panel** and forwarded to the PT for immediate execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system operates with a **real-time synchronization requirement**, where components must maintain **clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms** to ensure temporal consistency. The **end-to-end network latency** between the vehicle and the Digital Twin Entity is constrained to **≤100 ms**, as specified by the **3GPP Technical Specification 22.185** for Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) communication. The system does not explicitly mention specific sensor update frequencies (e.g., LiDAR or camera frame rates) beyond the implied real-time processing of object tracks and vehicle state."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin constellation is organized as follows:
   - **Physical Twin (PT)**: 1/10-scale autonomous vehicle with **LiDAR**, **depth camera**, **speed controller**, and **steering servo**.
   - **Digital Twin System (DTS)**: Comprises three entities (**Physical Twin Entity**, **Digital Twin Entity**, **User Entity**) mapped to ISO 23247, with additional **Data Storage** as a cross-cutting component.
   - **Communication Infrastructure**:
     - **Intra-vehicle**: ROS2 for inter-node communication within the PT and DT.
     - **Inter-vehicle**: Wi-Fi for **low-latency (≤100 ms)** communication between PT and Digital Twin Entity.
   - **User Interfaces**: **3D Visualization** (for monitoring) and **Control Panel** (for remote management), both part of the **User Entity**."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system supports **operational and development lifecycle stages** of the physical twin, covering:
   - **As-operated phase**: Real-time monitoring, remote management, and predictive maintenance (e.g., ACC optimization, emergency response).
   - **Development phase**: Troubleshooting via **data collection and reporting** capabilities, enabling developers to analyze system performance remotely.
   The DT does **not** explicitly model the **as-designed** or **as-manufactured** phases but focuses on **runtime behavior** and **operational insights** of the ACC system."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
   - **Sensor Calibration**: Pre-deployment calibration of **LiDAR** and **depth camera** to minimize measurement errors.
   - **Clock Synchronization**: **100 ms accuracy** for temporal consistency between PT and DT, critical for **ACC control loop** and **emergency braking**.
   - **Validation Against ISO 15622**: ACC functionality adheres to **performance class I** standards, with **lead vehicle detection** and **speed adjustment** validated via real-time testing.
   - **Uncertainty Handling**: **Kalman filter** in the **Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking FE** mitigates noise in sensor data, improving object track fidelity.
   - **Verification Mechanisms**: **ROS2 lifecycle management** ensures correct node execution, while **SQL database logs** enable post-hoc validation of system behavior."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the PT and DT includes:
   - **Network Protocol**: **Wi-Fi** for inter-vehicle communication, with **ROS2** for intra-vehicle node communication.
   - **Data Serialization**: **ROS2 message types** (e.g., `sensor_msgs/LaserScan`, `geometry_msgs/Twist`) for structured data exchange.
   - **Unit Conversion**: **Data Translation FE** handles conversions between sensor units (e.g., **rad/s to degrees/s** for steering angle) and control signals (e.g., **voltage commands** for motor actuation).
   - **Latency Constraints**: **End-to-end latency ≤100 ms** enforced via **3GPP TS 22.185** compliance for V2V communication."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is hosted and deployed as follows:
   - **Physical Twin (PT)**: Deployed on the **1/10-scale autonomous vehicle**, with **Jetson Orin Nano** running **ROS2** and **Jetpack 5.0**.
   - **Digital Twin Entity**: Hosted on the **Jetson Orin Nano** (same hardware as PT for simplicity) or potentially offloaded to a **cloud/edge server** for scalability.
   - **User Interface**: Rendered on a **remote client** (e.g., laptop/PC) accessing the DT via **Wi-Fi** and **ROS2 bridge**.
   - **Data Storage**: External **SQL database** hosted on a **separate server** (not specified in the document) for long-term data retention."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system integrates horizontally with the following external systems:
  - **ROS2 Ecosystem**: Leverages ROS2 for **inter-node communication** and integration with third-party libraries (e.g., **rclpy**, **tf2** for coordinate transformations, though not explicitly named in the document).
  - **SQL Database**: Stores and retrieves data for reporting and analysis.
  - **Cloud Infrastructure**: Offloads computation to **external hardware** (e.g., cloud servers) for scalability and resource management.
  The system does not explicitly mention integration with other Digital Twins or external automotive systems (e.g., fleet management platforms)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system adheres to the following standards:
   - **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture for Digital Twin development, adapted with deviations like the **Physical Twin Entity** and **decomposition of User Interface FE**.
   - **ISO 15622**: Standard for **Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC)**, implemented as **performance class I** functionality in the **Controlling FE**.
   - **IEC 62541 (OPC UA)**: Referenced as a potential enabler for **Data Translation FE**, though not explicitly implemented in this case study.
   - **3GPP TS 22.185**: Service requirements for **Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) communication**, informing the **≤100 ms latency** constraint."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system incorporates the following security and safety considerations:
  - **Safety-Critical Design**: The system is designed with **low-latency (<100 ms) and synchronized clocks (±100 ms)** to ensure reliable real-time operation, critical for autonomous driving.
  - **Remote Actuation**: The **User Entity** enables remote control of the ACC subsystem, including emergency braking, which must be executed with strict adherence to **ISO 15622** standards.
  - **Latency Constraints**: End-to-end latency is constrained to **≤100 ms** to prevent delays in critical control actions.
  The document does not explicitly address **cybersecurity threats** (e.g., unauthorized access, data tampering) or **liability frameworks** for remote operations. Assumptions about authentication or encryption are not provided."
]
